description: Define your Atlas Vector Search Index

fields.markdownDescription: Array of fields to index for vector search.
fields.description: Array of fields to index for vector search.

storedSource.markdownDescription: Specifies the fields to store on Atlas Vector Search. You can set this to `false` to disable stored source, or provide an object with `include` or `exclude` field lists. Note: `true` is not supported for vector search indexes.
storedSource.description: Specifies the fields to store on Atlas Vector Search.
